entry.title: Re: Where can I find free learning resources for ABAP Cloud back-end developers?
entry.content:
@Margit_Wagner 
Hello Margit, please could you guide me a bit ? I am following learning path Acquiring Core ABAP Skills. I settled BTP learning server, connect it with Eclipse and so on. Everything is working. But, when I want check the learning examples from the package /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE I can not. This package is not available in this server. Do I have to set something ? Because I have got subscription for 6 attempts as you can see on the screenshot below. /DMO/Flight is there but the first one mentioned not. I am trying to follow up the learning path without that, but it is really annoying that i can not see the examples, which are mentioned in the learning guidelines.

entry.title: Re: Supplier invoice number range
entry.content: Dear All , We have 7 company codes, any possible solution within Public Cloud 2502 as we need separate Supplier Number range for each company code. Infact country of company codes are also different.

entry.title: Re: LLM Fine-tuning
entry.content:
There were a couple of examples for fine tuning in the blog.  One of them was Building generative AI capabilities for ABAP. 

Do we also use fine tuning for Building generative AI capabilities for CAP ?

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
@OlgaDolinskaja Thanks Olga for your response.

Please find requested details:

1. How many custom objects in the system you check during such an ATC run?  Single INCLUDE also takes much time.
2. If you change a piece of code in a program for example: does the whole baseline get removed or just the findings related to this program appear again in the upcoming ATC run? Findings related to the program which were already baselined appear again.

Let me know if you need additional info.

Regards

Kavita

entry.title: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am running the boosters of sap build apps, and i am facing below mentioned error due to which i am unable to subscribe sap build apps.

I have tried subscribing the sap build app manually also, however it is also resulting in subscription failed in my trial account.

Please help in getting the solution for the same.

SAP Build SAP BTP cockpit

entry.title: Re: How to post tax relief in SAP Business ByDesign?
entry.content:
Hello Piotr,

Instead of making use of manual journal entries;

Try posting with the work center "Tax Management"> Manual Tax Entries. Input all necessary details and click "Post"

  • It is not advisable to make any entries to VAT accounts directly in the general ledger. These entries do not create entries in the tax register and are not entered in the tax subledger.

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @KavitaMane,

thank you for the details provided.

1. Regarding the performance issue with taking so much time also for a single INCLUDE I would recommend to open a ticket to SAP, this needs to be investigated in your environment

2. The baseline is effective as long as the related code sections remain unchanged: if the code is changed or a new code is added, the unique identifier for each ATC finding changes so that it does not match any more with the finding that has been added to the baseline. Therefore you get the findings again if you change source code of your program.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: SAP DM - Consuming Materials From a Predefined Storage-Container
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently trying to design a process using standard SAP DM; however, I am facing some challenges regarding its proper implementation.

The process is as follows:

There are two operations in total, and the users involved in these operations do not communicate with one another.

In the first operation (let’s call it Operation 10), raw materials are loaded into a basket and packaged. Physically, there are five different baskets available, and the same baskets are repeatedly filled and emptied. Each package that is created, assigned a unique number and status (NEW, PREP, RDY, CMPL).

In the subsequent operation (Operation 20), only baskets with a status of “Ready” are displayed, and the user selects the basket they wish to consume. The moment the basket is selected, the materials within that package are recorded in the consumption table, thereby completing the process.

Possible Solution:
Define each basket (all five) as an MM storage location and execute the first operation via MM.
Then, on the DM screen for the second operation, create a button for each basket (MM storage). When the user clicks the button for the basket they want to use, the system will read the content of that MM storage via DM and, using a repeater, process the consumption of each material through DM.

Problem:
In later stages, if a confirmation cancellation occurs and the corresponding materials are returned to the MM storage, they may mix with the materials in the active basket. This mix-up would prevent the active process from progressing smoothly.

So, do you have any suggestion to handle this situation? I will be expecting hear from you as soon as possible

Regards
MSY

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content:
@SharathSundar 

Hi Sharath,

  1. As Angela said, the link takes us to an SAP Sharepoint Login Page requesting information from the customer. I asked our CSM to place it in our dedicated Customer SAP Workzone and coud watch it from there.
  2. If the texts are inferred based on multiple combinations found in our Job Profiles and our Job Requisitions, how to you explain inferred skills that we know have nothing to do with our business. Below some examples of inferred skills that are not in our Job Profiles or in our Job Requisitions.
    • Electronic Dance Music (EDM)
    • Manutention et Port de Charges
    • Entretien et Nettoyage du Linge et des Vêtements
    • Julia
    • Fabrication

One of them is even in English. We do not maintain text in English. So, if English is not present, how can it infer an English skill in French?

Thank you,

Marcos

entry.title: Is it possible to include the attachments for invoices created through recurrence?
entry.content:
Hello,

Will the attachments uploaded to the recurrence invoice template be copied to the individual invoices when they are posted periodically? Can it do the same for a Journal entry recurrence as well? 

I'm using the apps "Manage Recurring Supplier Invoices" and "Manage Recurring Journal Entries" within  SAP S4hana public cloud.

Thank you in advance,

Regards,

Angeline

entry.title: Re: BAS - Load error in app using Attachment Services Reuse Component RAP V4 OData Service
entry.content: Hello, Did you found any resolution for this. I'm also facing the same issue just like yours

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports randomly crashes on .Export call with access violation
entry.content: We have a VB.Net application that generates PDF files using the CR .export function. It can generate 100's of PDF files. It works fine on Windows 10 but when any of our developers move to Windows 11 the code will start to have random access violations on the .export call which cannot be handled with a Try/Catch. We have updated the Crystal runtime to the latest version (CR13SP37MSI64_0-80007712) but that does not correct the issue. Has anyone else had this issue and been able to resolve it?

entry.title: How to make a mdc table editable?
entry.content:
Hello everyone. I am currently trying out the mdc:Table and was wondering if there is an easy wat to implement editability like in this example for m:Table.
I thought about adding an "editMode" indicator that controls the delegator on what template to use (Input if editMode=true, Text if editMode=False). Now I only need to figure out how to send a "update the table" event.
Or is there a completely different way to do this?

entry.title: Re: SAP MM - What material features determine that I have...
entry.content:
I mean, what kind of changes, like for example: change of "material type" determines that i have to change the material ID. Or in other way - what can i change (based on SAP MM views: Base Data 1 etc..) can be changed and will not force a change to the Material ID.

Or should I be talking about revisions of a given material?

entry.title: Hello All,Can you suggest me the table where settlement condition contract condition values stored
entry.content:
We have a requirement to update only condition contract condition values in sales order manually through price change BAPI, because condition contract values got changed but we can't update new value through standard SAP update option in SO item level because conditions configured like that.

Now we are able to update new values manually in SO with the help of BAPI by uploading excel sheet but those manual value should be validate with condition contract condition values and then only it should update in sales order.

 For example: 

Condition contract new value: 0.06- USD per unit

Manual value: 0.08 USD per unit passed through BAPI to update in SO


So BAPI shouldn't update it because contract value not matching with manual value.

BR
Kasi

entry.title: Re: Populating Contract Dates in Sales Orders using userexit
entry.content:
I know it is very old question, but if you want to set initial values of the Contract Data tab (VEDA table) you can use this code in include MV45AFZZ, form USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBAP:

  FIELD-SYMBOLS <xveda_tab> TYPE veda_t.

  CHECK vbap-matnr IS NOT INITIAL.

  ASSIGN ('(SAPLV45W)XVEDA[]') TO <xveda_tab>.
  CHECK         sy-subrc = 0
        AND NOT line_exists( <xveda_tab>[ vposn = vbap-posnr ] ).

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <xveda_tab> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<xveda_itm>).

  <xveda_itm>-mandt        = sy-mandt.
  <xveda_itm>-vposn        = vbap-posnr.
  <xveda_itm>-updkz        = 'I'.

  <xveda_itm>-vbegdat      = sy-datum.
  <xveda_itm>-vbegdat+6(2) = '01'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'RP_CALC_DATE_IN_INTERVAL'
    EXPORTING date      = <xveda_itm>-vbegdat
              days      = 0
              months    = 6
              years     = 0
    IMPORTING calc_date = <xveda_itm>-venddat.

It sets contract period start and end dates for 6 months from the current month.

entry.title: Re: VA01 User Exit to set Contract Dates
entry.content:
I know it is very old question, but if you want to set initial values of the Contract Data tab (VEDA table) you can use this code in include MV45AFZZ, form USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBAP:

 

  FIELD-SYMBOLS <xveda_tab> TYPE veda_t.

  CHECK vbap-matnr IS NOT INITIAL.

  ASSIGN ('(SAPLV45W)XVEDA[]') TO <xveda_tab>.
  CHECK         sy-subrc = 0
        AND NOT line_exists( <xveda_tab>[ vposn = vbap-posnr ] ).

  APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <xveda_tab> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<xveda_itm>).

  <xveda_itm>-mandt        = sy-mandt.
  <xveda_itm>-vposn        = vbap-posnr.
  <xveda_itm>-updkz        = 'I'.

  <xveda_itm>-vbegdat      = sy-datum.
  <xveda_itm>-vbegdat+6(2) = '01'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'RP_CALC_DATE_IN_INTERVAL'
    EXPORTING date      = <xveda_itm>-vbegdat
              days      = 0
              months    = 6
              years     = 0
    IMPORTING calc_date = <xveda_itm>-venddat.

 

It sets contract period start and end dates for 6 months from the current month.

entry.title: Re: External number range for Billing Documents (VF01) possibility in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Hello Experts, This requirement is for India country specific. I would really appreciate your advise. Thank you, kind regards Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Handling of bank charges in bank statement
entry.content: Great article, as always! I am in the middle of implementing this for our CAMT.053V8 and just wanted to add that standard XSLT-Transformation from SAP (FIEB_CAMT053_V8_TO_FEB) does not properly map the charges, at least compared how they appear in our CAMT.053V8 files. So I created a Z_copy of that transformation and added custom logic; otherwise nothing is mapped to FEBEP-SPESK.

entry.title: strategy 81 with considering lot size restrictions/parameters
entry.content:
We would like to use strategy 81 (assemble to order with planned orders) and also take the lot sizes (max. lot size) into account.
Example: With a maximum lot size of 6 pieces, 2 planned orders should be created for a customer order of 8 pieces via assemble to order processing (planned orders). One for 6 pieces and one for 2 pieces.

We need it because we need the availability check for the components and also the capacity check. But we also need the system to consider the lot sizes from the material because of the restrictions on the production shopfloor.


Can the lot sizes from the material master be taken into account in assembly processing or not?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Personas scripting overview
entry.content:
For the EWM standard transaction /SCWM/PACK we have business requirement to customize the SAP standard screen ‘Repack Product’ and add the 2 fields ‘Batch’ and ‘Barcode’.

Data for the field ‘Barcode’ will be supplied by scanning the barcode through RF gun and rest of the data in the screen including custom field ‘Batch’ should be populated by decoding the barcode string.

We need your suggestion for the feasibility of integration of RF gun with the SAP personas and further auto population of standard screen fields data along with custom field ‘Batch’ through barcode decoding.

can someone help me on this.

entry.title: Re: Certifications for Project Managers
entry.content:
Hi ekkert

The first certification uses only parts of the  "Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery" as underlying content while the second is 100% based on it.

Thank you,

Omar

entry.content: I am creating a new change request using the Fiori app Manage Business Partner. However, I am immediately prompted to fill in all the fields without the option to select the change request type. I remember that in NWBC, I had the ability to choose the change request type before proceeding. Why doesn’t the list of change request types pop up in Fiori?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Authorization issues

entry.title: SAC - Block/overwrite old bookmarks
entry.content:
Hi community,

in one of our Input Templates, we have made some changes since the last planning cycle. We have added a source column, which leads to data beeing written on, lets say, "Manual Adjustment". In the old version, we didnt had that column, hence data was writte to source "Unassigned".

If users use their old bookmarks, they still see the old version of the input template and data is written on unassigned, which is a problem.

I could copy the Input Template and dont include the bookmarks, but the users wouldnt be amused about creating new bookmarks.

Is there a solution? For example keeping the selected Filters in the bookmark, but apply them to the new input template?

Do you need further explanation?

Kind regards,

Eric

Raimund

entry.title: Re: MDG Cloud ready Mode: Integration of S/4HANA with SAP Build process automation & SAP Build w
entry.content:
Hi,

I've performed all the steps but when trying starting the workflow we get the error "Destination 'BC_CPPA_INBOUND_DEST' is not valid for bgRFC" and the flow fails to start in step 1 (EDI).

After creating bgRFC inbound destination we get runtime error "BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT".

Have you encountered these issues as well during configuration and do you have an idea how to fix it?

Thanks in advance for any reply

entry.title: Re: How to link a Storage bin / Material with a Storage L...
entry.content:
Hi @BBQMaster68 

I'm assuming that the storage type 2 is assigned to storage location 2 in SPRO: Logistics Execution -> Warehouse Management -> Interfaces -> Inventory Management -> Define Storage Location Control -> Stor. Location Control in Warehouse Mgmt:

If so, the once you confirm a transfer order to storage type 2 of a stock that belongs to storage location 1, the system will recognize that the stock doesn't belong to the storage location assigned to the storage type 2, which is storage location 2. Thus, WM will automatically initiate MM stock transfer posting from storage location 1 to storage location 2, so you don't need to use any transaction here.

However, if you mark "Combine Post. Changes" checkbox, then the transfer posting to storage location 2 will not be triggered automatically. It needs to be triggered either manually with LQ01 or with a periodic background job with report RLLQ0100.

Again, that functionality doesn't work if storage type 2 is storage unit managed!

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Guide: Establishing On-Premise or Cloud SFTP Connectivity in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

We have the use case that we want to upload files from an SFTP server to the Datasphere every day. After the successful transfer, the files in the SFTP server directory should be deleted. Is there a solution for this?

Thanks

Raimund

I want to create a summary query of a collection of sales orders.

This data comes from the ORDR or RDR1 table.

I want to add which user last updated the sales order.

Can this be added?

entry.title: Is SAP Enable Now the best solution for SAP implementation partners?
entry.content:
Hello,

We, as SAP implementation partners are looking for an authoring solution to produce user guides, or small tutorials for our customers during the implementation of SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, or other SAP products.

It seems that Enable Now is a powerful solution, but more for the customer side. We want to produce small personalized contents, for several customers. 

Is SAP enable now the best tool to create such contents? does SAP have a "smaller" tool just to produce tutorials and short user guides? We've been using the classical tools, like Microsoft Word or Powerpoint.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Cloud - Live data connection - No data sources
entry.content:
Hi former_member823622,

Pls try this once. 

Go to Settings in your browser, then click Cookies and site permissions, then click Manage and delete cookies site data and turn on the permission for Block third party cookies.

Now go to your server and on the right hand side of the URL area you will see an option for Third party cookies blocked, click on the icon (refer to highlighted icon in the screenshot below) and allow cookies.

This should work.

Thanks.

The PO line item quantity and GR quantity are the same, and the invoice has also been processed for the same quantity.

In the header details, the PO quantity to be delivered is showing as zero.

Despite this, I am still encountering the error: "DCI cannot be set."

Could you please assist in resolving this issue?

RISE with SAP

Sandra

entry.title: Re: SAP Build App Integration Issue with BTP Destination
entry.content:
Destination Configuration:

Additional Properties:
- appgyver.Enabled
- HTML5.DynamicDestination
- MobileEnabled
- sap.applicationdevelopment.actions.enabled
- sap.build.usage
- sap.processautomation.enabled
- WebIDEEnabled
- WebIDEUsage

you need this service or from SAP maintsarvice 

thanks

Could someone let us know what could be the reason?

Thanks and regards

Paolo

SAP Convergent Charging

entry.title: Generate Documentation in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I created a simulation that includes a book page with text, followed by recorded snapshots.

It looks great in the Library, but when I generate the Hands-on Guide, the book page is moved into a table.

I need the book page to create a standalone page with text in the Hands-on Guide, not a table.

Is there a way to define this? 

I have reviewed the Resources > Documentation Settings area in Producer, but I haven't been able to succeed.

 

Could you help me please?

Thank you so much.

Heli

entry.title: Re: Set up your SAP S/4HANA system for EAM Inspection Checklists
entry.content:
Hi Surya,

WHY using a QM inspection plan instead of a PM maintenance task list with inspection characteristics?

The classic calibration solution with inspection lot origin=14 uses the same PM maintenance task list for 2 purposes:

  • Template for PM work order
  • Defining inspection characteristics

This does not allow flexible assignment of multiple inspection plans and inspection lots to one work order.

The design of the new solution is different and has other advantages, too. Please see SAP note 3421917 - Inspection checklists and calibration
Link: https://me.sap.com/notes/3421917/E

The classic calibration solution still works in S/4HANA but won't be supported in new APIs or user interfaces in the future.

Recommendation: In S/4HANA you should use the new inspection checklists with QM inspection plans.

Best Regards,

Uwe

entry.title: Re: Consuming data from an Analytical Model
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,
We have a requirement to take snapshots of the open orders (weekly) and report on it. The analytical model can only provide current order position and the snapshots will provide historical data for trend reporting. 

Thanks,
Hiri

entry.title: Security Vulnerabilities in Crystal report engine for eclipse SP31
entry.content:
Hello

Looks like there are some vulnerabilities in Crystal Report Runtime Engine For Eclipse SP31 in the xmlconnector.jar file:

bouncycastle: xmlconnector.jar/lib/bcprov-jdk18on-171.jar   
Vulnerabilties: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.bouncycastle/bcprov-jdk18on
Remediation version: 1.8

Apache Santuario: lib/xmlconnector.jar/lib/xmlsec-2.2.3.jar
Vulnerabilties: https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.apache.santuario/xmlsec
Remediation version: 4.0.3

Is there any chance this can be added to the roadmap?

Thank you!

Apologies, these were the vulnerabilities for sp30, which have been addressed in SP31

entry.title: Partial Amount Write-off using BAPI's
entry.content:
Hi All

We are trying to a partial amount write-off in a custom application (to enable mass write-off's) by calling the BAPI - BAPI_CTRACDOCUMENT_WRITEOFF, but it is not supported

The configuration is there to support partial-writeoffs and we can do the partial write-off via the standard t-code FP04 succesfully.

Is there a way to do partial write-off using the standard BAPI's or FM's? We don't want to create a new document id.

Best Regards

Navneet

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS mta app local run with calls to SAP B1 db ret...

entry.title: 11 great Business AI prototypes at the Capgemini private Hack2Build!
entry.content:
Introduction

The Hack2Build initiative is traditionally a 7-day challenge for multiple partners to build working prototypes. At first each partner's submitted use case is evaluated for technical feasibility and customer relevance by SAP. Then SAP experts provide guidance and coaching to partners with accepted use cases. Finally partners are invited to demo their prototype to a panel of judges in a demo jam. 

Our partner Capgemini is obviously taking Business AI very seriously and approached us shortly after SAP Sapphire 2024 with 40+ Business AI use cases across SAP business portfolio, prepared by various teams around the world. A first review showed the potential so we jointly decided to kick off the Capgemini private Hack2Build: an initiative to help Capgemini develop Business AI solutions that are relevant, reliable, and responsible for the 10-15 most promising use cases.

About the Capgemini private Hack2Build Initiative

Capgemini used SAP AI Core along with SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) services, including SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine's Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG). These capabilities helped contextualize information with any of the available 23 Large Language Models (LLMs) to provide enterprise-grade responses. Capgemini teams also utilised existing business services to enhance their AI solutions.

The initiative ran from November 19-27, 2024 in an hybrid mode with a few teams working out of the SAPLabs France in Mougins with a few SAP experts together while other teams connected remotely from around the world with the entire SAP team.

The event concluded with a demo jam where Capgemini teams showcased their working prototypes that integrated SAP BTP and SAP AI Core services with both SAP and non-SAP data. The demo jam session produced a winner and two runners-up. This blog highlights the use cases developed by the 3 winning teams as well as the other 8 finalists.

 

Kitchen captAIn
GDPR CompliBuddy
Material Master Data Maintenance
Intelligent Capacity Scheduling
Accelerated GxP Compliance Documentation
Oil & Gas Exploration & Production Modelling,Planning
Emergency Response Simulator
SAP CX - Hyper personalization
GenAI-powered vendor invoice management
Augmented field worker
Intelligent Contract Management

Winning Solutions

The top 3 solutions selected by the panel of judges were:

🥇  Augmented Field Worker
🥈  Accelerated GxP Compliance
🥉  Intelligent Material Master Data Maintenance

 

🥇  Augmented Field Worker

The solution leverages Generative AI, SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), and HANA Database with Vector Engine to automate Non-Conformity (NC) qualification and resolution. It empowers field engineers with a mobile app providing instant similarity analysis based on a picture from a suspected NC, voice-activated commands e.g. with access to necessary documentation to declare an NC, and real-time repair recommendations, streamlining workflows, reducing manual effort, and enabling faster, more accurate decision-making in challenging field environments.

 

🥈  Accelerated GxP Compliance

Accelerated Good Practices (GxP) Compliance Tool provides GenAI-powered pharma documentation capabilities by connecting with core SAP processes via APIs to extract key data points. GenAI drafts initial content based on pre-defined templates and automates data entry based on pharma guidelines and company baselines, ensuring compliance to regulatory bodies and GxP norms.

 

🥉  Intelligent Material Master Data Maintenance

Intelligent Material Master Data Maintenance is a RAG-based SAP solution that helps to reduce of manual workload and errors, supports faster onboarding of materials using AI, increases data accuracy and reduces risks and costs in the supply chain.

 

Finalists

Below a short description of the 8 finalist solutions in no particular order

Kitchen captAIn

Kitchen captAIn is an intelligent solution catering to grocery-based platforms. It provides grocery/product details to customers with specific recipe/menu ideas, highlights details like allergy ans calorie details based on preferences to ensure an optimal and personalized buying experience while maximizing grocery utilization and minimizing waste.

GenAI Hyper personalization

 GenAI Hyperonalization collects real-time clickstream data from website visitors, including country, locations, cart items, purchases, duration, etc. It utilizes the captured data to create dynamic user personas for each session. Business users can generate personalized content and images for the products and delivering instant, tailored content directly on the store front.

Intelligent Contract Management

Intelligent Contract Management provides GenAI-powered contract management capabilities. It connects SAP Ariba processes with APIs to extract key data point, create and review draft contracts with intelligent insights from Ariba and S4HANA, and augment Ariba's Clauses library with new clauses.

Smart Field Report

Smart Field Report addresses the challenges of manual, time-consuming reports generation in Oil & Gas upstream operations e.g. production, drilling, emissions, by automating data extraction, analysis, and reporting on SAP and non-SAP relevant data. It improves efficiency by eliminating human errors, provides accurate and consistent reports, and offers actionable insights for better decision-/recommendations-making. The solution also enables real-time operations, ensures compliance, and drives digital transformation, promoting smarter and data-driven operations.

 

Intelligent Capacity Scheduling

Intelligent Capacity Scheduling tackles production scheduling challenges by using Generative AI to create a dynamic and intelligent scheduling system. It enhances SAP current setup by making schedules more adaptive and data-driven.

 

Panel of Judges

We extend our sincere thanks to the judges who lent their expertise to this initiative. Senior leaders and experts from SAP Business AI, SAP BTP, and Partner Ecosystem Success carefully evaluated 6-minute pitches from participating teams. They assessed each solution’s potential to address real-world challenges using SAP Business AI and provided thoughtful feedback to help partners further refine their solutions in the next phase of Hack2Build.

Helen Kushakovska

SAPLabs Mougins Managing Director

Christian Koenig

Director - Business AI Partner Product Management

Gianluigi Bagnoli

Global VP, BTP Solution Architects, PES

Rudi Held

Vice-President, Global Head of SAP Co-Innovation Lab, PES

Special Thanks

We extend our appreciation to the SAP team members from SAP Business AI, BTP Architecture, Strategic Partner Enablement, and SAP Co-Innovation Lab, whose expertise guided partners to successfully develop their solutions during the Capgemini Private Hack2Build Business AI initiative. Special thanks as well to the entire SAPLabs France team in Mougins for hosting us in their nice facilities.

Way Forward

Hack2Build consists of two phases: the hack phase and the build phase. All finalist teams in this initiative continue working with SAP, maintaining momentum in this co-innovation journey. SAP engages with Capgemini to expand the business AI prototypes into comprehensive offerings for customers.

As of today 3 solutions already made it (below) and 6 are in the process:

Augmented field workerValidated Partner Use Case (VPUC)
Smart Field ReportValidated Partner Use Case (VPUC)
Kitchen captAIn

Validated Partner Use Case (VPUC)

Video

Please click on the VIDEO LINK  for a first impression how the initiative looked like.

 

SAP AI Core SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: How to enable Scorm for Mobile SAP Successfactors App
entry.content: I have created a course on Scorm1.2 Its working fine on laptop & computer but I want to enable it to be able users to access on Mobile SAP Successfactors App

entry.title: Re: De-mystifying SAP Cloud Identity Services Integration with SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi @javier_rp1 ,

what's not an issue is the mix of protocols, so OIDC between subaccount / Work Zone and Cloud Identity services, and then SAML between Cloud Identity services and corporate IdP.

Since you write "Workzone app configured using OIDC on "applications Tab"", do you mean you see Work Zone as application in the administration console of Cloud Identity services? That's the place where you need to set the desired corporate IdP (under "conditional authentication"), just like you probably already did for the "application" that represents the whole subaccount in Cloud Identity services. (Depending on the trust configuration towards the corporate IdP, you might also have to adjust the subject name identifier and attribute mappings.)

If this doesn't help yet, I suggest you open a support ticket to clarify what's wrong, and if it was a configuration issue somewhere, update this thread to share this learning with the community.

Kind regards

Heiko

entry.title: SAP GUI Power user not working on desktop
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently we are using Citrix to access SAP GUI + SAP Power user when wfh. We are planning on removing people"s access to Citrix later this month so have moved these 2 applications onto peoples desktops; however for some users they are not able to access the applications (are getting a logon balancing error).

Could you provide some assistance with this issue?

entry.title: Is there something for user tolerance for accepting products below the minimum SLED on Synch GR?
entry.content:
Hello experts!
I´m working on the implementation of the Cloud Public Edition for a client that already has legacy SAP. The client has the following situation on the legacy system that he wants to keep for the new one:

On the Synchronous GR (Post Goods Movements/Migo), they have set a minimum remaining shelf life requirement. The system does not allow regular users (like warehouse operators) to post a GR if the product is below the minimum number of remaining shelf life days. Only a few users (like the warehouse supervisor) are allowed to post the GR of products below the minimum remaining shelf life.

Is there anything that could be done for this on the cloud public?

Best regards

entry.title: SAP HANA 2.0 Cockpit - Installation Guide
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP HANA Cockpit is a powerful web-based tool for managing and monitoring SAP HANA databases. Today, I completed the installation of HANA Cockpit and wanted to share a structured guide to help others. This blog will focus only on the installation process, from prerequisites to post-installation checks.

Deployment Options

SAP HANA cockpit can be deployed on dedicated hardware, on shared hardware, or in an existing SAP HANA system (shared database).

SAP HANA Cockpit Deployment Options

In this scenario, the HANA cockpit has been installed on dedicated hardware (on Azure VM).

Before starting the installation, ensure you meet the following requirements:

System Requirements

✔️ Operating System: SUSE Linux / Red Hat Enterprise Linux (RHEL)

✔️ Hardware: Intel-Based Hardware Platforms / IBM Power Systems

✔️ HANA Database Version: Compatible with HANA 2.0

✔️ Required Disk Space: Minimum 30 GB for installation

✔️ Memory Requirement: At least 16 GB RAM

Software Requirements

✔️ SAPCAR: Required for extracting the installation files.

The following system configuration has been used,

✔️ Operating System: SUSE Linux 15.5

✔️ Hardware: Azure Cloud, Standard B4s v2 (4 vcpus, 16 GiB memory)

✔️ Disk Space: 128 GB (/hana/shared)

✔️ Memory: 16 GB RAM

Downloading the HANA Cockpit Package

  1. Log in to the SAP Software Download Center (https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/softwarecenter).
  2. Navigate the location below and download the latest available version.
    SUPPORT PACKAGES & PATCHES -> By Alphabetical Index (A-Z) -> H -> SAP HANA PLATFORM EDITION -> SAP HANA PLATFORM EDITION 2.0 -> SAP HANA COCKPIT 2.0.
  3. Transfer the .SAR file to your installation server. A mount has been created for /hana/shared and copied media to it.
  • Please Note: It is recommended that you download the latest support package for SAP HANA cockpit.

Extracting the Installation Files

Once the .SAR file is copied, extract it using SAPCAR:

  • SAPCAR -manifest SIGNATURE.SMF -xvf SAPHANACOCKPIT<version number>.SAR

Running the HANA Cockpit Installer

The SAP HANA database lifecycle manager (HDBLCM) is used to install the SAP HANA cockpit in a graphical user interface or the command-line interface.

This installation has been performed using the command-line interface.

You are logged in as root user.

  1. Navigate to the extracted directory (In this scenario, /hana/shared/Hana_cockpit)

    • cd /hana/shared/Hana_cockpit

  2. Run the installation command using hdblcm

    • ./hdblcm

  3. The installation wizard will start. Follow these prompts:
    • select "Install new SAP HANA Cockpit system"
    • Choose the installation directory (default: /hana/shared)
    • Define an SAP system ID (SID) (e.g., HCO)
    • Enter the instance number.
    • Assign a Cockpit Administrator password
    • Confirm the settings and start installation

 

Determine Ports for SAP HANA Cockpit and Cockpit Manager.

Once the cockpit installation is successfully completed, information about host and ports is displayed. If this information is no longer available, you can execute the following commands in the XS console to determine ports.

You are logged in as <sid>adm user.

Then navigate to the path below,

  • cd <sapmnt>/<SID>/xs/bin

Execute the command below,

  • xs apps

A list of all the running apps is displayed. Information on hosts and ports are displayed in the urls column.

Interface. You can login with COCKPIT_ADMIN

 

 

Conclusion & Next Steps

With the installation complete, you can now proceed with configuring HANA Cockpit, adding HANA database instances, and setting up monitoring.

#SAP HANA cockpit

Thanks

Nishatharu

entry.title: Re: Consuming data from an Analytical Model
entry.content: I could. However, I wanted to use the analytical model to leverage all the fields from the star schema. I have a bunch of master data views in the star schema at the analytical model level.

entry.title: Re: Standard or Custom Class for Application Logs? – Part 1
entry.content: Just to add another class, there is also XCO_CP_BAL, released for Cloud Development.

entry.title: Unable to check-out originals uploaded in DMS documents from Fiori
entry.content:
As of now with SAP GUI were able to check-out aready checked-in originals, i.e Word Documents,m to allow end users to keep adding notes in those originals. 

We have now the business requirement to use Fiori to keep updating Originals in the same way as weve been doing in SAP Gui.

Steps to reproduce the issue:

  1. Go to Fiori
  2. Go to CV02N Tcode
  3. Search for the DMS document
  4. Edit the document
  5. Select the Word Original
  6. Clikc the pencil icon to edit the document.
  7. The file will be downloaded into the My Downloads folder

Eventhough we edit the file the and check-in the original again, it will not upload  the latest changes

What is the required configuration to be done in Fiori or in SAP side to allow this behaviour same as the SAP GUI?

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Thanks for the detailed explanation. 
I need to have multiple line items in the payload with a single event trigger in this way.

[{ document = 101,documentitem = 10, quantity = 1}

{ document = 101,documentitem = 20, quantity = 2 }]

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: getting errors user not allowed to backup encrypted d...
entry.content: daptive Server Enterprise/16.0 SP04 PL05/EBF 30841 SMP/P/x86_64/SLES 12.4/ase160sp04pl05x/3611/64-bit/FBO/Fri Dec 29 02:49:10 2023 (1 row affected) 1> use db1 2> go 1> sp_displaylogin xyz 2> go Suid: 28 Loginame: dbtsops Fullname: DBTS Operations Default Database: master Default Language: Auto Login Script: Configured Authorization: oper_role (default ON) Locked: NO Date of Last Password Change: xxxxxxxx Password expiration interval: 0 Password expired: NO Minimum password length: 6 Maximum failed logins: 0 Current failed login attempts: Authenticate with: ASE Login Password Encryption: SHA-256 Last login date:xxxxxxxx Exempt inactive lock: 0 (return status = 0) 1>

ABORT ====> dbsqlexec error

entry.title: Has anyone implemented Time-of-Use Interfaces in S/4HANA
entry.content: We currently have 3rd party meter data management system providing aggregated interval reads via time-of-use interfaces (EMDUSFORM/EMDUSIFACE) with our ECC instance and AMI setup. Has anyone done a transition to S4/HANA and converted their existing MDUS formulas and interfaces? If so, was your transition a 1-1, or were there differences that required changes to existing setup.

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @Padmini2709,

perhaps deep payloads are something for you? You can also set them up to have deep array structures.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/rap-business-events-with-advanced-event-mesh-3-creating-events-with-deep/ba-p/13914285

entry.title: some Inbound emails from clients are getting rejected from sales and service cloud v2
entry.content:
We have client emails being sent to a shared mailbox in Exchange Online and that is set up with an automatic forwarder to SAP - We have found, that some of the clients don't have proper DKIM, SPF, DMARC records configured and thus SAP is rejecting the forwarded messages. 

Has anyone else come across this and come up with a solution?

entry.title: Re: Reimagining digital learning as an integrated part of a Digital Adoption Platform with SAP &&&&
entry.content:
Hi Kristina! 

My Understanding is that SAP Enable Now will stay around (from a Producer) standpoint and SAP WalkMe will basically become the new SAP Companion. Is that true?

How would Simulations look in the future state? Would existing simulations be editable in SAP WalkMe? And what about existing content that is already in SAP Companion and linked in an SAP Instance? Would that have to be re-linked?

entry.title: Re: Add user who last updated order
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, ou can get this information from the ORDR.UserSign2 field.

There you have the user that has updated the SalesOrder the last time. 

It relates with the OUSR table.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Walkthrough SAP Cloud ALM Process Authoring
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for your blog.

I wonder if you can help. We wish to be able to "Copy" a Solution Process Flow or Flow Diagram, and believe we should see the option to "Copy" (next to Detail) when going into Manage Scopes and viewing a specific scope item.

We do not see the Copy dropdown option next to Detail on top right of screen

 

In your blog above you mention that to be able to use edit mode for Process Authoring one of the two roles are required:-

Process Management Process Author or Cross Global Administrator

Maybe our issue is related to authorisation/ allocation of one of these roles.

Now, our issue is when we look under Manage Projects and Roles, we do not see either of the roles noted above.

Please can you help? Many thanks

Adrian

entry.title: Re: The two project control possibilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Enterprise projects and professional
entry.content:
Hi Sven,

Thank you for clarification, it is really helpful.

I have a business case where several companies are working on same project. And moreover, company A provides some material to company B in the project context. I think scope item 4AU can help but it is not intended to handle stock transfer, only activities or expenses.

I tried to create intercompany stock transfer order with project assignment but this is vorbidden in Public Cloud.

Do you have any recommandation for that scenario ? Already faced this configuration.

Thanks for your support.

Gregory

I have a business case where several companies are working on same project. And moreover, company A provides some material to company B in the project context. I think scope item 4AU can help but it is not intended to handle stock transfer, only activities or expenses.

I tried to create intercompany stock transfer order with project assignment but this is vorbidden in Public Cloud.

Do you have any recommandation for that scenario ? Already faced this configuration.

Thanks for your support.

Gregory

entry.title: Re: Copy ACTUALSQTYPRIORYEAR values are shifted by 10 weeks
entry.content:
Hi Bernd

We use technical week as our we map our Fiscal Year in IBP and we need to differentiate it from a calendar week. There are two specific reasons: a.- The period is a fiscal period, it does not necessarily end on the end of the month but the whole year follows a 4/4/5 weeks pattern per quarter. b.- The year ends on the 30th of September and we might that its a mid week day, in which case we have a classic IBP technical week.

I will follow your advice and use calendar week as a copy level and I will revert back with the results

Thanks again for your help

entry.title: Re: DRC - no data selected by "Switzerland VAT return (CH...
entry.content: Thanks for the feedback Patrick, reviewing the configuration you described, when I double click on the business function and click on the “Display Object List” icon I open the enhancements tree and see that the “%_EI_FIN_LOC_SRF_SWITCH_CHK” attribute is inactive, although the BF is active... can you confirm if your configuration is the same, I sent a private message with a print. Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Addition to stock putaway strategy

entry.title: Mass programmatic deployment of Fiori Elements applications on S/4HANA 2021 On-Premise
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using XCO library to generate many RAP Business Object on S/4HANA 2021 On-Premise, with appropriate Fiori Elements annotations using OData V2 UI service binding.

The problem comes when we want to deploy these RAP BO/Applications.

Is there a way to deploy Fiori Elements applications on mass, programmatic, as a background job?

entry.title: Re: Automatically assignment of service Ticket to agents !!!!
entry.content: Were you able to achieve it using SDK development?

entry.title: Re: Solving RSA1 issue after BW Refresh
entry.content:
@Marian_Zeis, In BW system, At RSA1 Transaction Code we need to create source system like ECC, SRM.

Where BW system can replicate the data from that source system.

And after system refresh we need to recreate or modify and fix it all source system is defined as old system (The system that used as source system during system refresh).

I hope it helpful to you🙂.

entry.title: Re: New Resource-Related Intercompany Billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Himani 

The resource-related intercompany billing does cost plus billing on top of the actual intercompany CO postings. Hence the value you see in screenshot is coming from the cost rate and ICO rate setup for the actual Intercompany CO postings. 

Varsha

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Subscription Failed
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502

entry.title: Re: Join the Innovation Journey with SAP Enterprise Threat Detection, cloud edition
entry.content:
One year later, this article is as relevant as it was before! 
Meanwhile, two updates: 

1. We have released the long-awaited Test & Demonstration SKU 8018321, available to partners for a nominal fee! You can request a quote via you partner account manager.

2. The partner page has moved - it is now available  here: https://partneredge.sap.com/en/products/etd/about.html 

For questions get back to @ToKe and @Lingscheid. Looking forward to hearing from you!

entry.title: Re: ways to start as a Consultant
entry.content:
Thanks Omar.

I know now that you have a financial background, so you should look for SAP S4 HANA Finance.

Create a LinkedIn profile if you do not have already.

Develop relevant skills in SAP S4 HANA Finance 

  • https://www.sap-press.com/sap-s4hana-finance_5606/?utm_source=sappressblog&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=Blogs&utm_term=s4hanafinancepillar&utm_content=2339

You need to get involve in SAP Forums (SAP S4 HANA finance) and get recommendations.

Also get some training online and apply for the positions.

Once you get a project even a junior level, you will learn a lot.

Regards,

Syed
